description_long: This fax machine features a robust, rectangular body with a matte black finish and a slightly curved top. The control panel is located on the front left, equipped with a small display screen and a series of tactile buttons arranged in a grid. The top section houses a light gray automatic document feeder with a visible paper input slot and a central label, while the output slot is positioned at the front edge. The machine's sides are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing its utilitarian design. There is no visible telephone handset attached to the device. The overall appearance is modern and functional, suitable for office or business environments.
description: A modern, matte black fax machine with a gray document feeder, front control panel, and a compact, rectangular design.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the control panel with display and buttons, as well as the document feeder and output slot.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back and top of the document feeder, with minimal visible controls.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the machine and the full extent of the document feeder.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the smooth, featureless side and the edge of the control panel.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the front left side, featuring a rectangular LCD screen at the top left, with a grid of tactile buttons arranged in rows below and to the right of the display. The buttons are grouped closely together, with some larger and some smaller, and there are no visible indicator lights.
attribute_paper_tray_design: The paper tray is integrated into the top of the machine as part of the automatic document feeder, with a gray cover and a central slot for paper input. The tray appears to have adjustable guides and is designed for stacking multiple sheets.
attribute_output_slot_location: The output slot is located at the front center, just below the document feeder, with a slight overhang for easy paper retrieval.
attribute_handset_attachment: No telephone handset is visible or attached to the device.
